homepage.heroSubline: Durable concrete solutions built to withstand the Louisiana climate. Quality craftsmanship for homes and businesses.
homepage.aboutTitle: Decades of Concrete Expertise in New Orleans
aboutText: Miles & Sons Cement started with a simple mission: to provide reliable and lasting concrete work throughout the New Orleans area. From humble beginnings, we've grown into a trusted name, poured over countless projects, and built a reputation on hard work and integrity.

Our approach is straightforward. We assess each project meticulously, use only quality materials tailored to our unique climate, and execute with precision. We believe in clear communication, transparent pricing, and delivering results that exceed expectations. We understand the challenges posed by the New Orleans environment, and we build accordingly.

We're proud to be a part of the New Orleans community. We source materials locally whenever possible, support local initiatives, and strive to contribute to the city's growth and resilience. We treat every project, big or small, with the same level of care and dedication.

valueProps.title: Proven Durability
valueProps.description: Concrete solutions designed to withstand New Orleans' humidity, flooding, and termite threats.

valueProps.title: Expert Craftsmanship

valueProps.title: Local Expertise

homepage.ctaSubline: Contact Miles & Sons Cement today for reliable and durable concrete solutions.

services.name: Driveway Installation
services.shortDescription: Durable and attractive driveways built to last in New Orleans.
services.description: A new driveway isn't just about curb appeal; it's about functionality and longevity, especially in a place like New Orleans. We specialize in driveway installations that can withstand the unique challenges of our climate – from intense humidity and flooding to the persistent threat of termites undermining the base. We start with proper site preparation, ensuring a stable foundation that prevents cracking and shifting. Our team uses reinforced concrete mixes designed for heavy use and weather resistance. We offer a variety of finishes, from traditional broom finishes to decorative stamped concrete, to complement your home's architecture. We handle everything from excavation and grading to pouring, finishing, and sealing. We also ensure proper drainage to mitigate water damage from frequent heavy rains. We understand local building codes and obtain necessary permits to ensure compliance. A well-built driveway adds value to your property and provides a safe, reliable surface for years to come.
process: Step 1: Site Evaluation and Design – We assess your property and discuss your driveway needs and design preferences.
Step 2: Excavation and Grading – We prepare the site by removing existing materials and establishing proper grading for drainage.
Step 3: Concrete Pouring and Finishing – We pour and finish the concrete with precision, ensuring a smooth and durable surface.
Step 4: Curing and Sealing – We properly cure the concrete to maximize strength and seal it to protect against the elements.

faq.question: How long does driveway installation take?
faq.answer: Most driveway installations take between 3-5 days, depending on the size and complexity of the project.

faq.question: What type of concrete is best for driveways in New Orleans?
faq.answer: We recommend a reinforced concrete mix with a high PSI rating to withstand heavy loads and extreme weather conditions.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for driveway installation?
faq.answer: Yes, in most cases, a permit is required for driveway installation in New Orleans. We handle the permit process for you.

services.name: Patio Construction
services.shortDescription: Custom patios designed to enhance your outdoor living space.
services.description: Extend your living space outdoors with a custom-designed patio from Miles & Sons Cement. We build patios that are both beautiful and functional, perfect for entertaining or relaxing in the New Orleans climate. From simple concrete slabs to elaborate multi-level designs, we can create a patio that meets your specific needs and style. We offer a variety of finishes, including stamped concrete, exposed aggregate, and colored concrete, to create a unique look. We also consider factors like drainage and sun exposure to ensure your patio remains comfortable and durable. Our patios are built to withstand the humidity and occasional flooding that are common in our area. We use high-quality materials and proven construction techniques to ensure your patio will last for years to come. We handle all aspects of the project, from design and excavation to pouring and finishing. Let us help you create the perfect outdoor oasis.
process: Step 1: Design Consultation – We work with you to design a patio that meets your needs and complements your home.
Step 2: Site Preparation – We prepare the site by excavating and leveling the ground.
Step 3: Concrete Pouring and Finishing – We pour and finish the concrete to create a smooth, durable surface.
Step 4: Sealing and Finishing Touches – We seal the concrete to protect it from the elements and add any finishing touches.

faq.question: What is the best material for a patio in New Orleans?
faq.answer: Concrete is an excellent choice for patios in New Orleans due to its durability and resistance to moisture and termites. We can also incorporate other materials like brick or stone for accents.

faq.question: How much does a concrete patio cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a concrete patio varies depending on the size, design, and finish. Contact us for a free estimate.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for patio construction?
faq.answer: In some cases, a permit is required for patio construction in New Orleans. We can help you determine if a permit is needed and handle the application process.

services.name: Concrete Repairs
services.shortDescription: Reliable concrete repair services to restore the integrity of your property.
services.description: From cracked sidewalks to damaged foundations, Miles & Sons Cement provides comprehensive concrete repair services throughout New Orleans. We understand the unique challenges that our climate poses to concrete structures, including moisture damage, erosion, and settlement issues. We use proven repair techniques and high-quality materials to restore the strength and appearance of your concrete surfaces. Our services include crack repair, patching, resurfacing, and foundation repair. We begin with a thorough assessment of the damage to determine the best course of action. We then execute the repairs with precision and attention to detail, ensuring a long-lasting solution. We address the underlying causes of the damage to prevent future problems. Whether you have a minor crack or a major structural issue, we can help. We're committed to providing reliable and affordable concrete repair services to homeowners and businesses in New Orleans.
process: Step 1: Damage Assessment – We inspect the damaged concrete to determine the extent of the problem.
Step 2: Repair Plan – We develop a repair plan based on the assessment.
Step 3: Concrete Repair – We execute the repairs using proven techniques and high-quality materials.
Step 4: Prevention – We address the underlying causes of the damage to prevent future problems.

faq.question: How do I know if my concrete needs repair?
faq.answer: Common signs of concrete damage include cracks, spalling (flaking), and settlement. If you notice any of these issues, it's best to have your concrete inspected by a professional.

faq.question: Can you repair cracks in my foundation?
faq.answer: Yes, we specialize in foundation crack repair. We use epoxy injection and other proven techniques to seal cracks and prevent water intrusion.

faq.question: How long will the repairs last?
faq.answer: The longevity of the repairs depends on the extent of the damage and the repair techniques used. We guarantee our work and use materials designed for long-lasting performance.

services.name: Foundation Services
services.shortDescription: Expert foundation repair and construction for the challenging New Orleans environment.
services.description: New Orleans' unique geography and climate demand specialized foundation services. Miles & Sons Cement offers expert foundation repair and new construction solutions tailored to the specific challenges of our region. We understand the risks of soil subsidence, water damage, and termite infestation, and we design our foundations to withstand these threats. Our services include foundation repair, leveling, underpinning, and new foundation construction. We use advanced techniques such as piling and soil stabilization to ensure the long-term stability of your structure. Whether you're building a new home or need to repair an existing foundation, we have the expertise and experience to get the job done right. We work closely with engineers and inspectors to ensure code compliance and structural integrity. We're committed to providing reliable and durable foundation solutions that protect your property for years to come.
process: Step 1: Site Investigation – We conduct a thorough site investigation to assess soil conditions and identify potential foundation problems.
Step 2: Foundation Design – We design a foundation that meets the specific needs of your property.
Step 3: Foundation Construction or Repair – We execute the construction or repair with precision and attention to detail.
Step 4: Quality Assurance – We conduct quality assurance checks to ensure the foundation meets our high standards.

faq.question: What are the signs of foundation problems?
faq.answer: Common signs of foundation problems include cracks in walls, uneven floors, sticking doors and windows, and water leaks.

faq.question: How much does foundation repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of foundation repair varies depending on the extent of the damage and the repair techniques used. Contact us for a free inspection and estimate.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for foundation work?
faq.answer: Yes, a permit is typically required for foundation work in New Orleans. We handle the permit process for you.

services.name: Sidewalk Installation
services.shortDescription: Safe and durable sidewalk installation that enhances neighborhood walkability.
services.description: Miles & Sons Cement provides sidewalk installation services that prioritize safety, durability, and accessibility in New Orleans. We understand the importance of well-maintained sidewalks for pedestrian safety and neighborhood aesthetics. We install sidewalks that comply with ADA standards and local regulations. Our services include sidewalk construction, repair, and replacement. We use high-quality concrete mixes that are resistant to cracking and weathering. We also ensure proper drainage to prevent water damage and ice buildup. Our team is experienced in working in residential and commercial areas, minimizing disruption to traffic and pedestrians. We handle all aspects of the project, from excavation and grading to pouring and finishing. We're committed to providing sidewalks that are safe, durable, and aesthetically pleasing.
process: Step 1: Site Survey and Design – We survey the site and design the sidewalk to meet local regulations and accessibility standards.
Step 2: Excavation and Grading – We prepare the site by excavating and leveling the ground.
Step 3: Concrete Pouring and Finishing – We pour and finish the concrete to create a smooth, durable surface.
Step 4: Curing and Sealing – We cure and seal the concrete to protect it from the elements.

faq.question: What are the requirements for sidewalk installation in New Orleans?
faq.answer: Sidewalk installation in New Orleans must comply with ADA standards and local regulations. We are familiar with these requirements and ensure compliance.

faq.question: How long does sidewalk installation take?
faq.answer: Sidewalk installation typically takes a few days, depending on the size and complexity of the project.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for sidewalk installation?
faq.answer: Yes, a permit is required for sidewalk installation in New Orleans. We handle the permit process for you.

services.name: Concrete Demolition & Removal
services.shortDescription: Safe and efficient concrete removal services for residential and commercial projects.
services.description: When concrete structures need to be removed, Miles & Sons Cement offers safe and efficient demolition services. Whether you're renovating a property, clearing space for new construction, or removing damaged concrete, we have the expertise and equipment to handle the job. We prioritize safety and environmental responsibility in all our demolition projects. Our services include concrete breaking, cutting, and removal. We use specialized equipment to minimize noise and dust. We also dispose of concrete debris in an environmentally friendly manner. Our team is experienced in working in tight spaces and challenging conditions. We handle all aspects of the project, from site preparation to debris removal. We're committed to providing concrete demolition services that are safe, efficient, and environmentally responsible.
process: Step 1: Site Assessment – We assess the site and develop a demolition plan.
Step 2: Safety Precautions – We implement safety precautions to protect workers and the surrounding environment.
Step 3: Concrete Demolition – We demolish the concrete using specialized equipment.
Step 4: Debris Removal – We remove and dispose of concrete debris in an environmentally friendly manner.

faq.question: How do you ensure safety during concrete demolition?
faq.answer: We prioritize safety by using specialized equipment, implementing safety precautions, and providing our team with thorough training.

faq.question: How do you dispose of concrete debris?
faq.answer: We dispose of concrete debris in an environmentally friendly manner, recycling whenever possible and using approved landfills when necessary.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for concrete demolition?
faq.answer: Yes, a permit is typically required for concrete demolition in New Orleans. We handle the permit process for you.

serviceAreas.content:
Miles & Sons Cement is proud to offer comprehensive concrete services throughout New Orleans, Louisiana. From the historic French Quarter to the vibrant Garden District, we understand the unique architectural landscape of this iconic city. Our skilled team delivers top-quality concrete solutions for residential, commercial, and industrial projects, ensuring durability and aesthetic appeal that complements the city's charm.

Whether you need a new driveway in Lakeview, a foundation for a building in the Central Business District, or concrete repairs in Uptown, Miles & Sons Cement is your trusted partner. We are committed to providing exceptional workmanship and outstanding customer service, using only the finest materials to ensure long-lasting results. We are experts in navigating the permitting process and adhering to local building codes.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Miles & Sons Cement did an outstanding job installing our new driveway in Lakeview. The team was professional, efficient, and the finished product is exactly what we wanted. They even helped us navigate the city permitting process. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: John B.
reviews.text: We hired Miles & Sons to build a patio in our backyard in the Garden District. They did a fantastic job with the design and the construction was solid. There was a slight delay due to weather, but they communicated effectively throughout the process.

reviews.name: Lisa K.
reviews.text: Our sidewalk in front of our house in Metairie had some major cracks and was a tripping hazard. Miles & Sons Cement came out and repaired it quickly and professionally. It looks great now and is much safer.

reviews.name: David R.
reviews.text: After Hurricane Ida, we noticed some cracks in our foundation. Miles & Sons Cement came out and assessed the damage. They provided a detailed repair plan and executed it flawlessly. Our house feels much more stable now. They're experts in New Orleans foundation work.

reviews.name: Emily S.
reviews.text: Miles & Sons installed a new sidewalk for my business in the French Quarter. The job was done quickly and the quality of work was excellent. The only reason I didn't give 5 stars is because communication was a little slow at times.

reviews.name: Robert P.
reviews.text: I had an old concrete slab in my backyard that needed to be removed before starting a new landscaping project. Miles & Sons Cement came in and took care of it quickly and efficiently. They left the site clean and tidy. Great service!
